page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database of human genes, their products, and involvement in diseases. It automatically integrates gene-centric data from ~150 web sources, including genomic, transcriptomic, proteomic, genetic, clinical and functional information.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Database of human genes, their products, and involvement in diseases. It automatically integrates gene-centric data from ~150 web sources, including genomic, transcriptomic, proteomic, genetic, clinical and functional information.
